programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: Fire Country S4

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: A fan-favorite junior chef makes a triumphant return, just in time for the wildly popular Top Chef Junior Food Truck Battle! The 6 remaining chefs must divide into teams to whip up custom food truck concepts and imaginative menus all their own. But with only 24 hours to deliver the goods for a crowd of hungry diners, things take a left turn when unexpected weather sends the chefs into a spinout. Will they manage to stay on course or will their food truck dreams come to a screeching halt?

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: A giant, mysterious crate awaits the chefs in the kitchen and things take a hairy turn when they discover some surprising guests will be doing the shopping for them today! Animal expert and conservationist Jeff Corwin stops by to introduce the chefs to some wild animal ambassadors that send the chefs on a global, culinary adventure to cook meals inspired by different regions of the world.

programme.desc: Rodney enlists Leon and Darlene to join The Rod Squad, whose heroic mission is to prevent Andy from getting in trouble with Mrs. J. After donning ridiculous outfits and infiltrating a sticky bun warehouse, things start to get very silly.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney really is the perfect pet... until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Much to his delight, Rodney learns he is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. Much to his chagrin, Mr. J learns Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, what with all the lounging and the resting and the napping, Rodney totally forgot!

programme.desc: A giant, mysterious crate awaits the chefs in the kitchen and things take a hairy turn when they discover some surprising guests will be doing the shopping for them today! programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1

programme.desc: Lumpus becomes paranoid when he thinks Lazlo has discovered his secret handshake.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Parrot was the best keeper of secrets in the whole of Tinga Tinga. Infact Parrot couldn't open his beak at all! Then one day some beast dares to steal Lion's mane and Parrot sees the whole thing! But how is going to tell Lion?! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bushbaby didn't have big eyes. She had tiny little eyes and she was always getting lost. Strange things begin to happen and there are stories that Majitu the Great Giant has returned to Tinga Tinga. Young Bushbaby doesn't believe a word of it... and convinces the other animals that Majitu the Giant does not exist. "If you can't see him, he's not real". But then she does see the Giant and her eyes grow big as planets. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car

programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: All Hail King Julien

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When George and Harold want to win the school Avocadgrow contest, they accidentally turn their science teacher into a giant avocado monster

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict “no-babies” policy. Meanwhile, Banker Baby Benny visits the startup company to check on his investment. Tina has to cover up how the heat has split her coworkers into lawless factions fighting over a fan and a mist cooler.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: An overworked and under loved Precious has to choose between the Templeton Family startup business or Crispin Biscuits’ fun playtime. Meanwhile, the company makes its first purchase: upgraded communicators! R & D Baby Simmons is reluctant to fix the model they have, which picks up signals from her favorite lvorian soap opera, “Bridges Aflame.” Over a live broadcast, Simmons must convince the cast to tie up every loose plot thread before she has to lose the signal forever.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.desc: Chef Paik returns with his dream team and takes on the challenge to introduce Korean cuisine in France.

programme.title: I-LAND2 : N/a
programme.desc: Girl version of ENHYPEN is coming! The ultimate survival variety program by top producer TEDDY, following the creation of the next generation K-pop girl group.

programme.title: Yumi's Cells
programme.desc: Adapted from the popular webtoon of the same title, it tells the story of an ordinary office worker Yumi through the eyes of her brain cells, which controlled her thoughts, feelings and actions.

programme.title: Yumi's Cells
programme.desc: Adapted from the popular webtoon of the same title, it tells the story of an ordinary office worker Yumi through the eyes of her brain cells, which controlled her thoughts, feelings and actions.

programme.title: The Village Barber
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber’s license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: Walking Through The Village
programme.desc: Actor Gu Bon-seung shows the warmth and purity of life in the village along the river, and presents how new history was made and became one’s memory.

programme.title: Wok The World
programme.desc: "Demon Chef" Alvin Leung and his students are travelling to different countries to explore various local Chinese cuisines.

programme.title: Crazy Tour
programme.desc: 4 mad men, starving for dopamine and thrills, are setting off in search of the 'craziest' challenges hidden around the world.

programme.title: Atom Boyz II
programme.desc: 'Atom Boyz 2' is a Taiwanese group-based survival audition show where contestants will overturn the galaxy with music and unleash a brand new cosmic wave.

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: Villains
programme.desc: A crime drama depicting bloody clashes and confrontations between villains over counterfeit "supernote" money.

programme.title: Villains
programme.desc: A crime drama depicting bloody clashes and confrontations between villains over counterfeit "supernote" money.

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: Fresh off the Sea
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.title: 3 Am Part 3
programme.desc: Three different short movies revolving around a similar theme: a sinister presence when the clock strikes 3.00 am.

programme.title: The Battle: Roar To Victory
programme.desc: Over a 4 day period, a fierce battle takes place between Korean independence militias and Japanese forces in Manchuria, China.

programme.title: Kiss And Spell
programme.desc: When a ghost-fearing magician falls for his staffer, who happens to be haunted by her dead best friend, he must face his fears while convincing her he'd make an excellent boyfriend.

programme.title: Hostiles
programme.desc: In 1892, a legendary Army Captain reluctantly agrees to escort a Cheyenne chief and his family through dangerous territory.

programme.title: From A House On Willow Street
programme.desc: After a young woman is kidnapped, her captors soon come to realize that in fact they may be the ones in danger and this young woman has a dark secret inside her.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: An MMA champion finds himself trapped in a prison in Thailand and is freedom depends on defeating a 400-pound killer in an underground match.

programme.title: In The Line Of Duty 4
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop and two American cops are onto a suspected harbor worker and are forced to team up when they discover that the suspect is a witness on the run from the CIA

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, must ensure the safety of an informant in possession of sensitive information

programme.title: Backtrace
programme.desc: An amnesiac lone surviving thief of a violent armored car robbery is broken out of psych ward and given an experimental drug in the hopes of recovering the memories he's forgotten

programme.title: Legendary Amazons
programme.desc: In early 11th century China, the Song Dynasty is being invaded by armies of the rival state Western Xia. Yang, the last of a long line of Song generals, is killed and his widowed wife Mu leads other widows into battle to save their dynasty.

programme.title: Destination Wedding
programme.desc: Two miserable and unpleasant wedding guests find themselves drawn to each other and develop mutual affection despite themselves

programme.title: Wheels On Meals
programme.desc: Two mobile restaurant owners team up with their detective friend to save the beautiful woman who was a pickpocket.

programme.title: Secret Zoo
programme.desc: A lawyer and zookeepers disguised themselves as animals in order to save a zoo from getting shut down.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From birth life is filled with risk - and reward. To reach adulthood, animals must constantly overcome incredible obstacles. They must learn to find food, secure a home, attract a mate, and raise the next generation with only one thing on their mind - staying alive.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From finding a mate in the branches, to adapting to life at height, tree dwelling animals have evolved unique traits to ensure they thrive in this hostile and complex environment.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Using ingenious adaptations, and devious techniques, prey species have evolved incredible tricks to escape from the jaws of death.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Reptiles, amphibians, insects and fish are found in every corner of our world - and for this special group of animals, life is regulated by the sun.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Being just that little bit different, can bring huge advantages, but it also presents almighty challenges. By going against the grain, these animals have found unique ways to stay alive.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: These animals live in the extremes but have created ingenious tools and techniques to cope with the harshest challenges to their continued survival.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From birth life is filled with risk - and reward. To reach adulthood, animals must constantly overcome incredible obstacles. They must learn to find food, secure a home, attract a mate, and raise the next generation with only one thing on their mind - staying alive.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: The protected transport of emergency and special forces personnel is its raison d’être. The police forces’ special service vehicles are designed for breaking barricades and other obstacles.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: Electricity harnessed from wind has become the second largest source of energy in Germany since 2017. Nearly 30,000 wind turbines are operating throughout the country, covering approx. 19 percent of energy consumption.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: From heiress of a giant media empire to wanted felon, witness the strange saga of the Patty Hearst kidnapping of 1974.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: The protected transport of emergency and special forces personnel is its raison d’être. The police forces’ special service vehicles are designed for breaking barricades and other obstacles.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: Electricity harnessed from wind has become the second largest source of energy in Germany since 2017. Nearly 30,000 wind turbines are operating throughout the country, covering approx. 19 percent of energy consumption.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Being just that little bit different, can bring huge advantages, but it also presents almighty challenges. By going against the grain, these animals have found unique ways to stay alive.

programme.title: Into The Puma Triangle
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, a Montana native wildlife expert works with wildlife filmmaker René Araneda to capture the wild pumas of Torres del Paine National Park in Chilean Patagonia. Together, they have filmed things seen nowhere else in the world that will unlock the mystery of the puma’s true nature.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes a mini cheese trip around the world in his own backyard, Toronto, one of the most diverse and cultural cities on the planet.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s cheese quest continues in Greece, the motherland of Feta, and where cheese culture dates back thousands of years in ancient practices.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s final stop is beautiful British Columbia, Canada’s West coast, where an innovative cheese culture is driven by its ‘support local’ mentality.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Robin Williams’ Dead Poets Society co-star Gale Hansen, Mork & Mindy writer David Misch, friend and comedian Rick Overton, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Under the burning sun of Cape Cross, large colonies of seals gather on Namibia's Skeleton Coast...The males, who can weigh up to 360 kg, patrol the territory to protect their females and young. But new predators are coming from the land, forcing them to learn new defense behaviors.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: Mega Transports Specials
programme.desc: A unique mega transport made of steel and titanium with a special purpose: to extract tons of gold. This so-called autoclave is the biggest of its kind.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien cant sleep so he decides to go on a milk cleanse to help but after Todd is attacked by a horrible monster King Juliens nightmares cause the kingdom to question him as...THE NIGHT CREATURE

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Grug takes Ugga hunting to find her inner growl again, she's as fierce as ever until coming face-to-face with a mom and baby too cute to catch.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids are desperate to get back and help their fellow Panda Villagers, and Po decides he must figure out a way to defeat Jindiao before he controls the world

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: When Roz the boar comes to San Lorenzo to collect a bounty for capturing Puss, Pajuna tries to keep them separated before an epic fight breaks out

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After the events of the Boss Baby 2 film, adult businessman Theodore Templeton is framed for embezzling from his company and forced to revert back to his old Boss Baby self and crash with his brother Tim. But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Tina and Boss adjust to co-boss responsibilities while on a mission to rescue the baby with the best hair in the world from a lice outbreak. With opposing leadership views, the two split the existing field team's focus and discover a new archenemy in Lumpy the Park Duck.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Castle is attacked by an alien battle cruiser. The new Paladins must form Voltron for the first time in 10,000 years.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Princess Allura puts the Paladins through a rigorous training program in hopes of putting aside their differences and working together as a team.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: The girl’s plans to attend the Governor’s Ball are waylaid when they save a pregnant horse.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Parrot was the best keeper of secrets in the whole of Tinga Tinga. Infact Parrot couldn't open his beak at all! Then one day some beast dares to steal Lion's mane and Parrot sees the whole thing! But how is going to tell Lion?! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bushbaby didn't have big eyes. She had tiny little eyes and she was always getting lost. Strange things begin to happen and there are stories that Majitu the Great Giant has returned to Tinga Tinga. Young Bushbaby doesn't believe a word of it... and convinces the other animals that Majitu the Giant does not exist. "If you can't see him, he's not real". But then she does see the Giant and her eyes grow big as planets. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Christine (Big Chris' mum) is visiting Silver hatch. As is Mamma Mia… serious competition ensues!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Tin Top is feeling homesick so Big Chris tries to cheer him up. But who could that pesky varmint causing trouble on the track be?!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Set on reclaiming his throne, Uncle King Julien convinces Julien to go into Foosa territory. Julien creates a disguise and forces Maurice to join him.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Clover is forced to take a vacation, and while she's away, she meets the handsome and free-spirited Sage Moondancer.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: It's parents' weekend at Lake Summer Camp, and Krupp's eager to make amends with Harold and George ... or so he says.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold want Cash Networth to buy the camp and fire Krupp. But before he'll agree to pony up the dough, Cash has a small request of his own.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: To learn about jobs, Grug assigns kids to the first “shadowing”/Ugga mistakenly creates the first gossip to impress the “nitting” club

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Lured into an empty hotel where a baby has supposedly gone missing, the team is trapped by Crispin Biscuits, a chaotic British schoolboy baby who’s been hired to wreck Boss and Tina’s lives. Crispin puts the new company’s loyalty to a test in a series of fiendish puzzling mind games, all with the threat of constant balloon popping (horrible for baby ears!)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Our team’s startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a “Space Race”, competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend “moon landing” for a baby – a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized – and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After George and Harold T.P. the entire school with toilet paper, they are forced to flush it all down the toilet causing a giant explosion that turns the French teacher into the T.P. Mummy

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When George and Harold want to win the school Avocadgrow contest, they accidentally turn their science teacher into a giant avocado monster

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict “no-babies” policy. Meanwhile, Banker Baby Benny visits the startup company to check on his investment. Tina has to cover up how the heat has split her coworkers into lawless factions fighting over a fan and a mist cooler.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: An overworked and under loved Precious has to choose between the Templeton Family startup business or Crispin Biscuits’ fun playtime. Meanwhile, the company makes its first purchase: upgraded communicators! R & D Baby Simmons is reluctant to fix the model they have, which picks up signals from her favorite lvorian soap opera, “Bridges Aflame.” Over a live broadcast, Simmons must convince the cast to tie up every loose plot thread before she has to lose the signal forever.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: On their first day at Palomino Bluffs, the girls are determined to make a good impression. Cue the beachfront race — and a daring rescue!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The PALs run into their old rivals the BUDs on the first day of classes, prompting Lucky to run for class rep. Elsewhere, Abigail helps solve a mystery.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Grug wakes up without a voice, he and Ugga go on the hunt to find his voice, while Eep, Thunk, and Gran stay behind. But when the Valleyites come to Eep with questions for Grug, she takes this opportunity to be a leader by pretending to have a conversation with Grug in their cave

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Determined to create a key to the Dragon Eye, Ryker heads to Glacier Island to find the dangerous Snow Wraith being protected by the Dragon Riders

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters, it's up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Unaware of the war on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup, Snotlout and Johann discover an island full of dragons that have been wounded by the Dragon Hunters

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6
programme.desc: This riveting series takes viewers through the stunning twists and turns of real-life cases involving suspicious deaths. At the heart of each case is a pressing question: was the victim's demise the result of an accident, suicide, or possibly murder? Each hour-long episode traces the evolution of the investigation, from the discovery of the victim to the gathering of evidence to the efforts of detectives and family members determined to expose the truth, once and for all.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she’s ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards’ former family home. She’s determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: The Seasons

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Dogs Are Incredible 2
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice — helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times

programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

Anton and Erika have been a couple for 12 years already. While he's not yet ready to get married, Erika waits until he is and lovingly devotes her time to him.

programme.title: First Time
programme.desc: Watch as three young temptresses seduce their way to your home and tell you their hot first time experiences.

programme.title: The Day After Valentine's
programme.desc: A woman should take the responsibility of helping a brokenhearted and self-destructive man to fix his problems.

programme.title: Dyagwar: Havey O Waley
programme.desc: The story follows cousins Ruel and Manuel who, as security guards, take turns manning a residential compound run by obese crossdresser Shamcey. From sun up to sun down, the two observe and interact with the tenants.

programme.title: Bahay na Pula
programme.desc: Jane (Julia Barretto) and her husband come home to an old ancestral house she inherited from her grandma. As days go by, they realize something evil is living with them in the house.

programme.title: Magbuwag Ta Kay
programme.desc: "Magbuwag Ta Kay" (Let's Break Up, Kay) revolves around college sweethearts Roy (Rowell Ucat) and Kay (Akiko Solon), who have to come to terms of their looming breakup.

programme.title: Finally Found Someone
programme.desc: Aprilyn who is left by his groom on the day of their wedding becomes viral online. Devastated, she meets Raffy who works at a PR agency hired by the father of the groom who will help her move on.

programme.title: Itutumba Ka ng Tatay Ko
programme.desc: Teteng (Janno Gibbs), a single father and assistant to a film director, faces his last days due to a brain tumor. Despite his fear of confrontation, he becomes determined to protect his daughter from bullies.

programme.title: Untrue
programme.desc: A bruised and beaten wife named Mara (Cristine Reyes) seeks the help of Georgian police against her husband Joachim (Xian Lim). In this He-she said film, truths, lies and the dark past will be uncovered.

programme.title: Dr. X On The Air
programme.desc: Joe de Lirio (Leo Martinez) is a sexiologist, but he is better known as a radio personality. In his raunchy but highly rated radio program, "Dr. X" he gives out advice to sexually troubled women. But just as Joe is gaining a loyal following among wives, he too is earning the ire of husbands.

programme.title: Radyo
programme.desc: Ruben (Epy Quizon), who is living a miserable life, is suicidal for not only does he feel rejected by DJ Mila (Rufa Mae Quinto) for not playing his song request, but also by Myla (Katya Santos), an officemate whom he deeply admires but who despises him

programme.title: Masamang Ugat
programme.desc: Two brothers are separated after their mother dies. One becomes a cop (Mikey Arroyo), the other an assassin (Ace Vergel). The cop ambitiously wants to bring down a drug lord supported by politicians, while the assassin works for the same drug lord.

programme.title: May-December-January
programme.desc: A single mother tests her relationship with her teenage son when she starts an affair with his best friend, for whom her son also harbours feelings.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie go wild for a killer main street pick in Tennessee while Danielle visits Cleveland's queen of burlesque to close the deal on a racy piece of history.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: Five years after John F. Kennedy is killed by gunshot, his brother Robert meets the same fate. Who is really behind the killing of Robert Kennedy, and why?

programme.title: The Unbelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: Have you heard about the slackliner that takes a walk between two hot air balloons? Or the teenager whose hobby turns his block into a hazmat zone? These are the stories of history’s most unusual pastimes.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: American cars get a makeover when an engineer creates the first sports car. And Detroit's Big 3 begin transforming their functional, practical cars into American sports cars.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: The Alaskan wilderness is known for mysterious disappearances, stories of strange creatures, and is a hotspot for UFO sightings. Could Alaska's mysteries be due to a presence that is not of this world?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: Quawntay Adams gets caught up in a big marijuana bust and is sentenced to a long prison term. When he finds out he is going to be a father, he determines to break out of his maximum-security cell.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world’s most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies… Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.desc: We've heard the tales of great wars fought with groundbreaking weaponry, but what about everything else in between? Like missiles manned by pigeons to a helmet outfitted with firearms.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: There have been many sacred relics believed to be imbued with mystical powers. Is it possible that these ordinary items, like a tooth, or a soldier's spear, can have the ability to perform miracles?

programme.desc: From pedal cars to Power Wheels, we're rolling our way through the history of the hottest toys on wheels and the surprising stories behind their creations.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Facing soaring costs, mounting criticism, and a tight deadline, Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Malaysia (S1)

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Malaysia (S1)
programme.desc: After a riverboat ride in Kuantan, Jaime heads to Kuala Terengganu to explore the Crystal Mosque, learn the traditional art of boat-making and swim with the fishes.

programme.desc: Check out the inside scoop on fashion news, all the daily news you need to know, including standout fashion moments, major events, current collections and trends on and off the runway.

programme.title: The Beckhams
programme.desc: Discover the story of the unique family brand, the Beckhams who were married in 1999, and since then have used their names to sell everything from pants to whisky

programme.title: The Beckhams
programme.desc: Discover the story of the unique family brand, the Beckhams who were married in 1999, and since then have used their names to sell everything from pants to whisky

programme.title: Fashion Magazines
programme.desc: Explore the current array of the top fashion magazines, the vehicles of our luxury dreams and the source of inspiration. Check in for the latest updates, cutest outlooks and fashion insights

programme.title: Fashion Magazines
programme.desc: Explore the current array of the top fashion magazines, the vehicles of our luxury dreams and the source of inspiration. Check in for the latest updates, cutest outlooks and fashion insights

programme.title: Top Models
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Top Models
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Lingerie
programme.desc: Don’t miss the latest trends in the most sensual pieces of fashion, we’re talking about the latest lingerie collections presented on the world podiums! Sizzling hot looks from top lingerie designers

programme.title: Golden Swallow
programme.desc: A heroine finds herself in a love triangle with a swordsman and a warrior. They team up to conquer the evil forces of the martial arts world but she is unable to choose between both men even as they face a deadly duel.

programme.title: I Still Remember
programme.desc: Chi is a property agent who leads an aimless and unfulfilling life until he reunites with his P.E. teacher, Wong, from primary school. Despite his illness, Wong insists on keeping his promise of completing a 10K marathon to his late wife. Inspired by Wong, Chi brings himself to his feet and finds the courage to cheer himself on!

programme.title: Princess and 7 Kung Fu Masters
programme.desc: Seven Kung Fu masters live in Lucky Town, the only safe residing place in northeast China. When warlord Lam refuses to side with the Japanese, an agent is assigned to take over his army and kill his daughter using ninjutsu. Lam’s daughter escapes and seeks help from the seven masters, who finally defeat the enemy and save the warlord!

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: A docker, Lin Si Hai, accidentally saves Commissioner Cheng who then offers him a position in the police force. Lin is smart and soon rises through the ranks through treachery and corruption, before becoming a gangster.

programme.title: Ambitious Kung Fu Girl
programme.desc: Si Si, a spoiled and naive rich girl with only basic kung fu training, becomes enchanted by the legends of the fearless hero Qin Ge. Determined to escape her father’s arranged marriage, she disguises herself as a man and sets out to find him, hoping to challenge Qin Ge—only to be drawn into a deadly plot within the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Battle of the Wolf
programme.desc: On his flight home, former special forces sergeant Zhang Zhi Yong and his wife find themselves caught in a terrorist conspiracy masterminded by international criminals. Drawing on his unwavering courage and tactical expertise, he protects his wife and fellow passengers while dismantling the deadly plot and ensuring everyone's safe return home.

programme.title: One More Chance
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat stars as a down-on-his-luck gambler, Water, whose ex-girlfriend asked him to take care of their autistic son. As Water lives with his son, he soon finds his goal in life. When he discovers his son’s talent in running, Water decides to give up his dissipated life and support his son to achieve his dream.

programme.title: One-armed Swordsman
programme.desc: Accepted to the Golden Sword School after his father sacrificed his life to save his master, Fang Kang is resented by his fellow pupils and decides to leave. His master's daughter challenges him to a fight and cuts off his arm. Fang masters the art of sword fighting with one arm and finds himself returning to the School to save his master again.

programme.title: The Spiritual Boxer
programme.desc: One of the first kung fu comedies, this is a story about a con artist who uses kung fu to swindle villagers for money by pretending to be possessed by spirits. When they are threatened by bandits, he must use the same skills for good.

programme.title: The Myth
programme.desc: An archaeologist Jack, and a scientist William, stumble upon ancient Qin Dynasty artifacts that lead them to the mausoleum and mysteriously connects Jack to his past life as a warrior in ancient China, starting their mythical journey.

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong’s entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: On his way back to the midlands, Guo Jing meets Huang Rong and they quickly fall in love. However, Ouyang Ke proposes to marry Huang Rong at the same time, so Huang’s father sets up a duel for the two men to compete for her hand. Guo Jing finally beats Ouyang Ke to win Huang Rong back.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: A kung fu anthology film consisting of three stories: a man embarrasses himself while trying to prove his worth to the father of the woman he loves; a courtesan in love with a general will need to deliver a notorious bandit in exchange for him not being executed; and a group of bandits forms a plan to rescue a new friend from being executed.

programme.title: The Swift Knight
programme.desc: The Ming Emperor is dying with no heir to succeed the throne. His brother recalls that he has an illegitimate child with a court lady years ago and palace guards are sent to search for the heir. When the Emperor's nephew hires assassins to kill the child so he can be the successor, the Swift Knight comes to the rescue…

programme.title: Bituing Walang Ningning (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: A tale about an avid fan that attained her dream of someday becoming a bigger star than her idol.

programme.title: Isla Paraiso
programme.desc: A series of inexplicable and mind-boggling twists of incidents inside the hacienda take place as the animosity between two sisters heightens.

programme.title: Amo
programme.desc: This action movie tackles the issue of labor union. Starring Rudy Fernandez as Leon delos Reyes.

programme.title: Isa, Dalawa, Tatlo, Ang Tatay Kong Kalbo
programme.desc: Medel (Bembol Roco) is a pretty thief who gives his earnings to his neighbors who need it. But hid felonious activities stop when he marries Frieda (Beth Bautista) and adopts Bimbo (Niño Mulach).

programme.title: Libingan Ng Mga Buhay
programme.desc: This is the true story of Rodolfo Fuentes who was unjustly sent to jail at the very young age of 14.

programme.title: Minsan Pa Nating Hagkan Ang Nakaraan (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Helen looks like a woman who has everything anybody could want-a beautiful house, a loving husband, and a baby on the way.

programme.title: Silakbo
programme.desc: A killer-rapist was on the prowl and all of the victims seemed to have had some sort of connection with the maverick NBI agent, Andy, played by Cesar Montano.

programme.title: Baby Paterno (Dugong Pulis)
programme.desc: Baby Paterno (Roi Vinzon) comes from a well to do family. He is a womanizer and a partygoer who always ends up in trouble. Later on, he proves to be a good law enforcer. He tries to uncover serious crimes only to find out that the head of the syndicate is his superior.

programme.title: Pik Pak Boom
programme.desc: Two stories in one entertaining film about young people learning that happiness comes from learning how to give of one's self.

programme.title: Sgt. Miguel Carpio: Multiple Murder
programme.desc: An exemplary policeman dedicates so much time to his duties that his wife begins to feel neglected.

programme.title: Pre, Hanggang Sa Huli
programme.desc: Brandon is a hard-hitting cop on the trail of a drug syndicate. Cooper is a cop from a small barrio in the province. They were as different as night is from day, but they ended up as partners and very close friends.

programme.title: Sa Hirap At Ginhawa (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: In the story, a young couple eloped, got married and then must cope with problems like money, living on their own, trying to finish school and raising a baby.

programme.title: Love Notes
programme.desc: The popular radio and TV show for lonely hearts hosted by DJ Joe D'Mango came to the big screen with two stories of young love based on letters from listeners.

programme.title: Ang Pinakamagandang Hayop Sa Balat Ng Lupa 2
programme.desc: Cinema legend Celso Ad Castillo remakes one of his classic films with beauty queen Ruffa Gutierrez in her most daring performance.

programme.desc: Mee's Papa cooks and jogs every day. Mee thought he was an ordinary Papa, but Hee says he is strange. So, Mee forms an expedition team and heads out into town to find out what makes a Papa "ordinary."

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This week, three exciting young acts who are all on the rise: Omiya Hiyori, GOOD BYE APRIL, and nishina. Plus, May J. sings!

programme.title: Herbal Symphony #1 Spring
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Octopuses have been part of the Japanese diet for centuries. Today, some people even keep them as pets. Octopus catches have been decreasing, but efforts to farm them on land are now underway.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View Of Japan
programme.desc: The seaside town of Hakodate has long flourished as a port. One savvy cat waits by a fisherman, hoping he'll share his catch! We meet more local cats at a fish market and a historic graveyard.

programme.desc: Cosplayer Yuriko Tiger heads to Hokkaido to explore the real locations behind the hit anime Golden Kamuy. Discover the hidden history of Otaru and the rich traditions of the indigenous Ainu people.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Kyoto has many stores specializing in traditional snacks and treats, called Oyatsu. Some purveyors continue to use age-old ingredients and methods.

programme.desc: Maxine is a university student. She joined a school providing educational support and life advice to international students wanting to enter Japanese high school. This experience changed her life

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change The World
programme.desc: In recent years, urban intrusions by bears have significantly increased worldwide. What is behind this phenomenon? How is it related to global warming? We focus our investigation on cases in Japan.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Yamanashi / Shibata Fumie (product designer) "Kaiki" is a thin, brightly colored silk fabric. Shibata discovers how threads are arranged to produce a layered effect that resembles a digital image.

programme.desc: We visit a store opened by American Kevin Meyerson in Yamanouchi, Nagano. Catering to foreign residents who work in local industries, the shop is a workers' cooperative aimed at enlivening the town.

programme.title: Trails To Oishii Tokyo Mini 5Min.
programme.desc: Seri, or Japanese parsley, is in season from winter to spring. It's a key source of nutrition during (Japan's) cold winter months, when most other veggies are out of season.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The Jomon period dates roughly from 13,000 to 300 BC. We examine various aspects of Jomon society, with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: Lacquer.

programme.title: Bosai
programme.desc: Bear encounters are happening more frequently all over Japan. We'll look at new technologies to reduce the danger they pose, such as GPS tracking and an AI model that predicts bear encounters.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to the number eight. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #13 I want to see the snow. / To say what you want to do, replace the "masu" ending of a verb with "tai desu." For example, "mimasu" (to see) becomes "mitai desu" (to want to see).

programme.desc: There is a new friend at Peppa's playgroup - Mandy Mouse. Mandy has a wheelchair, is very sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The children have a music lesson with Madame Gazelle and all learn how to play the recorder.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig gets a parking ticket Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George take it upon themselves to make this Father's Day the best Father's Day ever.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a new synthesiser. Peppa, George and Mummy Pig have fun finding and sampling different sounds from around the house!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: Can Robot Blaze stop the Breakfast Bots before they bury Axle City in breakfast?

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger, and her rival Mayor Humdinger, to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: A super-strong wind has suddenly swept up all the surfers in the Adventure Bay Windsurfing Race.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S1 1
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. Sal, Murr, Q, and Joe serve up some mischief at White Castle, take on tourists in Times Square, and check out customers in a warehouse store.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S1 2
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket, and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S1 3
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. The guys approach strangers with humiliating one liners on the streets of New York, play a unique word game in a grocery store, and try to get shoppers to hop in a trunk at a car dealership.

programme.title: Friends S6 17
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica agree to give each other homemade presents for their six-month anniversary.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 3
programme.desc: It's lights, camera, action on 20 of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo and a guy famous for smoking weed. They all share the spotlight with our cast of hilarious comedians, including Brendon Walsh, Rachel Feinstein, and Mike Britt!

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 4
programme.desc: Get your credit cards ready, because TruTV is coming at you with 20 all new inventions that will both horrify and delight! We've got a loop to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and asound system for the great beyond that will blow the lid off of your coffin. Supplies may be limited, but the jokes from our cast sure aren't, featuring Judy Gold, Jared Logan, and Bryan Callen.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 2
programme.desc: Hey -- wish WE'D thought of that! TruTV counts down of the 20... uh, SMARTEST inventions to ever hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape your meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need. Our consumer-friendlycomics, including Sean Donnelly, Gilbert Gottfried, Chris Fairbanks, and Mike Trainor are on hand to finalize the sale. Order yours now!

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 3
programme.desc: Caution -- these people are operating motor vehicles under the influence of DUMB. TruTV is counting down the 20 most hysterical Motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on the water. See an out-of-control mail truck, a wild road-rager, and a man treating a motorbike like it's his girlfriend. Our cast of souped-up comedians, including Kevin McCaffrey, Chris Fairbanks, Rachel Feinstein, and Mike Trainor have pulled up to the curb with plenty to say.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 8
programme.desc: Put Thomas Edison to shame with 20 of the World's Smartest Inventions - from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon, and a whacky way to grow bananas at home. With innovative commentary from our cast ofhilarious comedians, including Mike O'Gorman, Jared Logan and Judy Gold.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S2 12
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to win a locker packed with recreational equipment and what looks like a hidden tractor. But when the dust settles and the cover's pulled back, one lucky hunter gets the surprise of a lifetime.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S2 13
programme.desc: Our buyers are in for the fight of their lives as they lock horns at the nation's biggest shipping container auction. This day's competition is not for the faint of heart. With skyrocketing bids and unprecedented merchandise, it's a gambler's dream come true. But at the end of the day, one buyer will be crowned with a six-figure payday while another will be sent home broken in two.

programme.title: ER S1 6
programme.desc: A pizza-delivery man crashes through the hospital's doors; a deadbeat sister wants to stay with Lewis.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 9
programme.desc: Let freedom ring, as World's Dumbest presents "Only in America." Featuring 20 of the most patriotic patriots in the land - from a cop's strange take on the national anthem, to a dangerous mishap with a bald eagle, and the most insane thank you to thetroops ever put on film. Plus awesome commentary from our cast of America's best comics, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey and Jaime Andrews.

programme.desc: Michael breezes into the Windy City to shock and amaze the Chicago locals. In a health store, he sells a supplement that proves you are what you drink, and at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Guillermo del Toro (Pan's Labyrinth) brings out the big guns in this sci-fi action epic about a ragtag band of humans that band together in the year 2025 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea. Using massive piloted robots to combat the alien threat, earth's survivors (including Charlie Hunnam, Charlie Day & Rinko Kikuchi) take the fight to the invading alien force lurking in the depths of the Pacific Ocean. Nearly defenseless in the face of the relentless enemy, the forces of mankind have no choice but to turn to two unlikely heroes -- a washed up former pilot and an untested trainee -- who now stand as earth's final hope against the mounting apocalypse.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Henry Fonda stars in director Alfred Hitchcock's real-life thriller of an innocent man trapped as the victim of a heartless criminal justice system--even though he's The Wrong Man. When an eyewitness to a robbery identifies musician Christopher Balestrero (Fonda) as the culprit, Balestrero cannot prove where he was on the day of the crime. Now, the wheels of justice--driven by the testimony of witnesses--mercilessly grind away the life of a man who looks remarkably like the real thief. Based on the novel The True Story of Christopher Emmanuel Balestrero by Maxwell Anderson.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When a deadly secret resurfaces, five friends are stalked by a vengeful killer.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: FBI joins the hunt for Amy's hacker. Grieving Hannah helps Amy save a poisoned patient, while Sonya and TJ uncover abuse behind a child's illness.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: A quick stop for gas turns into a parent's worst nightmare when a 6 year old boy is snatched during a carjacking. Tess and Jake race against the clock to bring the child home alive as Sunny pours all her focus away from her trauma and into the case. When Tess and Jake track down the perp in a tense OJ style pursuit, Tess's empathy defuses a potentially deadly standoff, reuniting the boy safely with his family and prompting her to reflect on her own family history. Meanwhile, Sunny fights back intrusive thoughts with self-defense classes, and Matt seems to be ready to move on from Tess— but who is he dating…?

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: When the Imperial Dukes reemerge, S.W.A.T. must mobilize to stop a large-scale attack.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: S.W.A.T. pursues a bank robbery crew that steals from the rich to help the poor. Deacon (Jay Harrington) struggles with what to do about some racist cops.

programme.title: NCSI: Sydney (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy researcher is found dead at a glitzy tech launch in a secret underground bunker, part of the team heads over to investigate, only to find themselves trapped inside with limited oxygen when the bunker fails to open.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15)
programme.desc: The semifinals wrap up in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to six challenging obstacles and race head-to-head for a spot in the national finals.

programme.title: FBI (Season 6)
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: Coroner (Season 1)
programme.desc: In the season one finale, a death hits close to home for the team.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.
